title: bromus hordeaceus var. molliformis
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. molliformis, also known as soft brome or small brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus var. molliformis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
